hero.sub: Turnkey interior design & renovation in the UAE. Over 20 years of expertise.

about.headline: Over 20 Years of Excellence
about.body:
For over 20 years we have been crafting interiors that transcend time.
Our team brings together architects, designers and engineers with international experience and education from Europe's leading design schools.
We manage the full cycle — from concept and engineering to construction, furnishing and final handover.
For us, an interior is not just design — it is an investment in quality of life, comfort and the owner's status.
about.nda: By client agreement, all project photography is confidential. Portfolio available upon request.

services.headline: Everything, End to End
services.s1body: End-to-end renovation management. We handle every contractor, timeline, and detail.
services.s2body: Concept development, 3D visualisation, material selection and design supervision.
services.s3body: Supply, installation and commissioning of AC, ventilation and climate control systems.
services.s4body: Full home automation — lighting, climate, security and AV in one seamless interface.
services.s5body: Premium sourcing of exclusive furniture, materials and décor from leading global suppliers.
services.s6body: Custom parametric furniture and bespoke architectural elements crafted with precision.
services.s7body: Property preparation for sale or handover — snagging, finishing and final punch list.
services.s8body: All approvals, permits and contracts — fully managed from start to completion.

why.headline: The New Era Difference
why.w1body: Two decades creating exceptional interiors in Dubai's luxury residential and hospitality market. Depth that shows not in credentials — in the questions we ask before we start.
why.w2body: Over one hundred completed projects — private villas, penthouses and hospitality spaces in Dubai's most prestigious addresses. Each supervised personally, start to finish.
why.w3body: Design, engineering, construction, furniture, installation — one team, no handoffs. Our clients never repeat themselves to a stranger. One point of accountability, throughout.
why.w4body: Our most significant projects are never seen publicly. Not because we have nothing to show — because our clients value privacy above publicity. NDA is not a limitation. It is a measure of trust.

contact.headline: Request a Personal Proposal
contact.sub: Tell us about your project. We will prepare an individual solution that takes into account the architecture of your space and your wishes.
contact.address: Office 101, Al Zarouni Business Centre, Al Barsha, Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai, UAE.
contact.name: Your Name

footer.copy: © 2026 New Era Interior Design. Dubai, UAE.

flexible_marbles.name: Flexible Marbles
flexible_marbles.description: Ultra-thin marble panels that bend, curve and wrap around any surface. Natural stone with the flexibility of a textile — applied to walls, columns and curved architectural elements without joints or breaks. Certified for both interior and exterior use: fireplaces, façades, bathrooms, swimming pools and kitchen backsplashes.
flexible_marbles.features: Weighs 10× less than natural stone|Roll sizes: 2.84 × 1.42 m — seamless coverage of large areas|Service life up to 30 years|Temperature range: −50°C to +150°C — ideal for fireplaces & façades|Green Environmental Certificate Class A — zero VOC, no formaldehyde

chandeliers.name: Chandeliers
chandeliers.description: Bespoke statement lighting crafted from natural porcelain, genuine Swarovski crystals and fibre-optic elements — all hand-formed by master artisans. Each piece is designed to order for a specific ceiling height, volume and ambient light condition. Any size, configuration or colour temperature — reproduced from any reference.
chandeliers.features: Genuine Swarovski crystals & fibre-optic illumination|Hand-formed natural porcelain components|Fully bespoke: any size, shape or colour temperature|Engineered for specific ceiling height and room geometry|Premium LED drivers — long lifespan, minimal energy use

soft_wall_panels.name: Soft Wall Panels
soft_wall_panels.description: High-density acoustic panels wrapped in premium fabrics — linen, velvet, boucle and leather. Installed within hours without dust, drilling or wet processes. The fabric layer can be replaced independently at any time, refreshing the interior without dismantling the underlying structure.
soft_wall_panels.features: Installed within hours — no dust, no wet work|Fabric replaceable without dismantling the frame|Reduces reverberation and improves room acoustics|Available in linen, velvet, boucle, leather and custom fabrics|No wall preparation required — safe for finished interiors

smart_toilet.name: Smart Toilet
smart_toilet.description: Fully automated intelligent sanitary systems combining a toilet with an integrated personal hygiene suite. Available in floor-standing (villas, hotels, spas) and wall-mounted (contemporary interiors, premium offices) configurations. Operates entirely without direct contact via integrated sensors and a remote control panel.
smart_toilet.features: Available in floor-standing & wall-mounted configurations|Fully contact-free operation with integrated sensors|Heated seat, auto-open lid, posterior & feminine wash|Personalised user profiles & deodorising system|Self-cleaning nozzle with UV sterilisation cycle

smart_dryers.name: Smart Dryers
smart_dryers.description: Ceiling-mounted warm-air drying systems with convection airflow, HEPA filtration and UV sterilisation of textiles. Designed for the UAE market where balcony drying is prohibited in most residential buildings. Combines fast drying with integrated LED lighting — suitable for apartments, villas, hotels and commercial spaces.
smart_dryers.features: Ceiling-mounted — frees up floor space entirely|Convection warm-air system for rapid, even drying|HEPA filtration + UV sterilisation of textiles|Integrated LED lighting for multifunctional use|Compliant with UAE regulations — balcony drying is prohibited in most buildings
